name: Neon (Tala Nicole Dimaapi Valdez)
description:
“ miss home... „

Sooo....I haven't made bots for several months. In fact, I didn't plan to make bots..but something clicked in my head and I wanted something with my beautiful girl Neon. I love her very much and I critically lack content with her.

I don't know if I will make bots often and a lot, but they will definitely be. At least I plan to. I walk around and joy until my exams and preparation for them began.

Write your opinion in the comments and, perhaps, what other bots you would like. kiss you, kittens
creator: vinasuuu
